name: left-to-right
description: Colour rows enforce strict left-to-right marking (skipped cells are forfeited forever) exactly like classic Qwixx; the Lucky 15 track is independently strictly ordered by construction (markLucky always targets the single next field, so there is no way to skip a field) and its legality never depends on colour-row state.

steps.note: index 1 (printed 11) is left of the already-marked index 3 - forfeited forever
index 4 (printed 8) is right of index 3 - legal
Lucky 15 field 1 (value 5) - independent of any colour-row state
always advances to the single next field (value 11) - no way to address/skip a field
lock index needs >=5 marks first; only 0 so far
now >=5 marks - lock is legal; marks {0,1,2,3,4,10} = 6 own marks + 1 lock bonus = 7 scoring crosses
row is locked - no further marks
still fully independent of the now-locked red row
